title: dodecatheon meadia var. hendersonii
intro: Dodecatheon meadia var. hendersonii, also known as the Henderson's Shooting Star, is a plant species that belongs to the Primulaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that can help soothe wounds and infections. The health benefits of Dodecatheon meadia var. hendersonii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat minor cuts and scrapes.
